METEOR_STRIKE_DESC: Summon a meteor from the sky, dealing AoE damage on impact and channeling 3 Lightning orbs
MACHINE_LEARNING_DESC: Draw 1 additional attack card each turn
LOOP_DESC: Trigger the passive of the rightmost orb at the start of each turn
COOLANT_DESC: At the start of each turn, gain 2 Block for each unique orb type
BIASED_COGNITION_DESC: Gain 4 Focus. Lose 1 Focus after each battle (max 4 battles)
BULK_UP_DESC: Lose 1 orb slot (min 1). Gain 2 Strength and 2 Dexterity
STORM_DESC: Channel 1 Lightning orb at the start of each turn; Channel 1 Lightning orb after playing a skill card
CREATIVE_AI_DESC: Gain an extra ability card reward after each level (regardless of level up)
FERAL_DESC: The first 0-cost card played each turn returns to the end of hand instead of discard pile
ECHO_FORM_DESC: The first attack card played each turn takes effect twice
BUFFER_DESC: The first damage taken each battle is nullified
SPINNER_DESC: Channel a Glass orb at the start of each turn; Glass orb passive fires an additional time
HAILSTORM_DESC: Channel a Frost orb at the start of each turn; at end of turn, release a hail dealing 6 damage if you have a Frost orb
THUNDER_DESC: Lightning orb evoke effect executes an additional time
CONSUMING_SHADOW_DESC: Channel a Dark orb at start of turn; Evoke leftmost orb at end of turn; Trigger all Dark orb passives on enemy kill
SUBROUTINE_DESC: Summon a drone. 20% chance after playing any card to replay it and refund 1 energy
CLAW_DESC: Deal 3xcombo damage and apply Slow to nearby enemies. +1 combo if any hit, miss interrupts remaining attacks
MOMENTUM_STRIKE_DESC: Deal 10 damage. If an enemy is hit, gain 2 attack energy
FOCUSED_STRIKE_DESC: Deal 9 damage. If an enemy is hit, gain 1 Focus for 5 turns
UPROAR_DESC: Deal 10 damage. If an enemy is hit, play the top card of the attack draw pile (free)
SUNDER_DESC: Deal 24 damage. If at least one enemy is killed, gain 3 attack energy
HELIX_DRILL_DESC: Deal (last turn's attack count + 4) damage, repeated for each attack card played last turn
BEAM_CELL_DESC: Deal 3 damage. Apply 1 Vulnerable for 5 turns
COMPILE_DRIVER_DESC: Deal 6 damage. Draw 1 attack card for each orb
SHATTER_DESC: Deal 11 damage to all enemies in expanding ring. Evoke all orbs
SCRAPE_DESC: Deal 7 damage and draw 1 attack card for each enemy hit (out and back)
GLASSWORK_DESC: Gain 5 Block for 5 turns. Spawn a Glass Barrier. For 5 turns, channel a Glass orb at the start of each turn
REFRACT_DESC: Spawn a moving Glass Barrier toward enemy. Channel 2 Glass orbs. Fire 3 beams at the barrier for 9 damage each
BALL_LIGHTNING_DESC: Launch a piercing orb. On each enemy hit: deal 1 damage and channel a Lightning orb
NULL_DESC: Deal 12 damage. Channel a Dark orb
DARKNESS_DESC: Channel a Dark orb. Trigger passive effect of all Dark orbs
LIGHTNING_ROD_CARD_DESC: Gain 5 Shield. Summon a Lightning Rod Barrier
VOLTAIC_DESC: Channel X Lightning orbs, where X equals Lightning orbs channeled this battle
WHITE_NOISE_DESC: Gain an extra ability card reward at end of level
SIGNAL_BOOST_DESC: Next ability card gained also grants a duplicate
BOOT_SEQUENCE_DESC: Gain 10 Shield that does not expire
GENETIC_ALGORITHM_DESC: Gain 1+4x(times used) Shield that does not expire
CHILL_DESC: Release an expanding ice ring. Slow enemies hit and channel a Frost orb per hit
FIGHT_THROUGH_DESC: Gain 13 Shield that does not expire. Add a Wound to your draw pile
SYNCHRONIZE_DESC: Gain 2 Focus per unique orb type for 10 turns
FUSION_DESC: For the next 5 turns, channel a Plasma orb at the start of each turn
CHAOS_DESC: For the next 5 turns, channel a random orb at the start of each turn
COOLHEADED_DESC: Draw 2 skill cards. Channel 1 Frost orb
SKIM_DESC: Draw 3 skill cards. For 5 turns, draw 1 extra attack card each turn
OVERCLOCK_DESC: Draw 1 skill card. For 5 turns, draw 2 extra attack cards each turn. Add a Burn to your attack draw pile
BOOST_AWAY_DESC: Invincible for 1s (enemy attacks can't hit). Add a Dizzy to your attack draw pile
SUPERCRITICAL_DESC: Gain 4 skill energy. For 5 turns, draw 5 extra attack cards and gain 5 attack energy each turn
TURBO_DESC: Gain 2 skill energy. Add a Void to attack and skill discard piles. For 5 turns, draw 1 extra attack card and gain 1 attack energy each turn
LEAP_DESC: Gain 9 Block for 5 turns. If moving, dash 100 units in movement direction (0.1s), invincible during dash with afterimage trail
